templates.title: Build a reusable creative prompt
templates.description: Combine material values, a seeded format choice, and an explicit installed chat model into a reusable image prompt.

templates.title: Describe and remix an image
templates.description: Describe a source image with an explicit vision model, then remix the description with an explicit chat model.

templates.title: Render deterministic image variants
templates.description: Render two independently seeded image variants in parallel and preserve both outputs.

templates.title: Prepare, train, and sample a LoRA
templates.description: Verify an image-caption dataset, train an image LoRA, and render a deterministic sample.

templates.title: Generate an image and animate it
templates.description: Generate a deterministic key image and pass it into native video generation.
